+ import Link from "next/link";
+ import { useSession, signOut } from "next-auth/react";
+ import { AppLayout } from "@/components/AppLayout";
+ import { ttsProviders } from "@/components/agent-tabs/constants/providers";
+ 
+ type TTSJob = {
+   task_id: string;
+   status: "queued" | "in_progress" | "done" | "failed";
+   job_type: string;
+   created_at: string;
+   updated_at: string;
+   providers?: string[];
+   language?: string;
+ };
+ 
+ // Helper function to map provider value back to label
+ const getProviderLabel = (value: string): string =&gt; {
+   const provider = ttsProviders.find((p) =&gt; p.value === value);
+   return provider ? provider.label : value;
+ };
+ 
+ export default function TTSPage() {
+   const router = useRouter();
+   const { data: session } = useSession();
+   const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;
+   const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);
+   const [jobs, setJobs] = useState&lt;TTSJob[]&gt;([]);
+   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
+   const [error, setError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+   const [sortOrder, setSortOrder] = useState&lt;"asc" | "desc"&gt;("desc");
+ 
+   // Fetch TTS jobs
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     const fetchJobs = async () =&gt; {
+       if (!backendAccessToken) return;
+ 
+       try {
+         setIsLoading(true);
+         setError(null);
+         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+         if (!backendUrl) {
+           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+         }
+ 
+         const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/jobs?job_type=tts&#96;, {
+           method: "GET",
+           headers: {
+             accept: "application/json",
+             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+             Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,
+           },
+         });
+ 
+         if (response.status === 401) {
+           await signOut({ callbackUrl: "/login" });
+           return;
+         }
+ 
+         if (!response.ok) {
+           throw new Error("Failed to fetch TTS jobs");
+         }
+ 
+         const data = await response.json();
+         setJobs(data.jobs || data || []);
+       } catch (err) {
+         console.error("Error fetching TTS jobs:", err);
+         setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load TTS jobs");
+       } finally {
+         setIsLoading(false);
+       }
+     };
+ 
+     fetchJobs();
+   }, [backendAccessToken]);
+ 
+   const formatStatus = (status: string) =&gt; {
+     switch (status.toLowerCase()) {
+       case "in_progress":
+         return "Running";
+       case "done":
+         return "Done";
+       case "queued":
+         return "Queued";
+       case "failed":
+         return "Failed";
+       default:
+         return status;
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   const getStatusBadgeClass = (status: string) =&gt; {
+     switch (status.toLowerCase()) {
+       case "done":
+       case "completed":
+         return "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-500/20 dark:text-green-400";
+       case "running":
+       case "in_progress":
+         return "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-500/20 dark:text-yellow-400";
+       case "failed":
+       case "error":
+         return "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-500/20 dark:text-red-400";
+       case "pending":
+       case "queued":
+         return "bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-500/20 dark:text-gray-400";
+       default:
+         return "bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-500/20 dark:text-gray-400";
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   const formatDate = (dateString: string): string =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const date = new Date(dateString.replace(" ", "T"));
+       return date.toLocaleString("en-US", {
+         month: "short",
+         day: "numeric",
+         year: "numeric",
+         hour: "numeric",
+         minute: "2-digit",
+         hour12: true,
+       });
+     } catch {
+       return dateString;
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   // Toggle sort order
+   const toggleSort = () =&gt; {
+     setSortOrder(sortOrder === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc");
+   };
+ 
+   // Sort jobs by updated_at
+   const sortedJobs = [...jobs].sort((a, b) =&gt; {
+     const dateA = new Date((a.updated_at || a.created_at || "").replace(" ", "T")).getTime();
+     const dateB = new Date((b.updated_at || b.created_at || "").replace(" ", "T")).getTime();
+     if (isNaN(dateA) || isNaN(dateB)) {
+       return sortOrder === "asc"
+         ? (a.updated_at || "").localeCompare(b.updated_at || "")
+         : (b.updated_at || "").localeCompare(a.updated_at || "");
+     }
+     return sortOrder === "asc" ? dateA - dateB : dateB - dateA;
+   });
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;AppLayout
+       activeItem="tts"
+       onItemChange={(itemId) =&gt; router.push(&#96;/${itemId}&#96;)}
+       sidebarOpen={sidebarOpen}
+       onSidebarToggle={() =&gt; setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
+     &gt;
+       &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+         {/* Header */}
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold"&gt;Text-to-Speech Evaluation&lt;/h1&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-muted-foreground text-base leading-relaxed mt-1"&gt;
+               Evaluate TTS quality across multiple providers
+             &lt;/p&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={() =&gt; router.push("/tts/new")}
+             className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer"
+           &gt;
+             New TTS Evaluation
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Jobs List / Loading / Error / Empty State */}
+         {isLoading ? (
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-8"&gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;circle
+                 className="opacity-25"
+                 cx="12"
+                 cy="12"
+                 r="10"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth="4"
+               &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 className="opacity-75"
+                 fill="currentColor"
+                 d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+               &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ) : error ? (
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-base text-red-500 mb-2"&gt;{error}&lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; window.location.reload()}
+               className="text-base text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+             &gt;
+               Retry
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ) : sortedJobs.length === 0 ? (
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+             &lt;div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-muted flex items-center justify-center mb-4"&gt;
+               &lt;svg
+                 className="w-7 h-7 text-muted-foreground"
+                 fill="none"
+                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth={1.5}
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;path
+                   strokeLinecap="round"
+                   strokeLinejoin="round"
+                   d="M19.114 5.636a9 9 0 010 12.728M16.463 8.288a5.25 5.25 0 010 7.424M6.75 8.25l4.72-4.72a.75.75 0 011.28.53v15.88a.75.75 0 01-1.28.53l-4.72-4.72H4.51c-.88 0-1.704-.507-1.938-1.354A9.01 9.01 0 012.25 12c0-.83.112-1.633.322-2.396C2.806 8.756 3.63 8.25 4.51 8.25H6.75z"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+               No TTS evaluations yet
+             &lt;/h3&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4"&gt;
+               Create a new evaluation to compare TTS providers
+             &lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; router.push("/tts/new")}
+               className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+             &gt;
+               New TTS Evaluation

+             {/* Table Header */}

+ "use client";
+ 
+ import React, { useState } from "react";
+ import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+ import { AppLayout } from "@/components/AppLayout";
+ import { TextToSpeechEvaluation } from "@/components/evaluations/TextToSpeechEvaluation";
+ 
+ export default function NewTTSEvaluationPage() {
+   const router = useRouter();
+   const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);
+ 
+   // Header with back button
+   const customHeader = (
+     &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+       &lt;button
+         onClick={() =&gt; router.push("/tts")}
+         className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+         title="Back to TTS evaluations"
+       &gt;
+         &lt;svg
+           className="w-5 h-5"
+           fill="none"
+           viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+           stroke="currentColor"
+           strokeWidth={2}
+         &gt;
+           &lt;path
+             strokeLinecap="round"
+             strokeLinejoin="round"
+             d="M15.75 19.5L8.25 12l7.5-7.5"
+           /&gt;
+         &lt;/svg&gt;
+       &lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;span className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+         New TTS Evaluation
+       &lt;/span&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;AppLayout
+       activeItem="tts"
+       onItemChange={(itemId) =&gt; router.push(&#96;/${itemId}&#96;)}
+       sidebarOpen={sidebarOpen}
+       onSidebarToggle={() =&gt; setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
+       customHeader={customHeader}
+     &gt;
+       &lt;TextToSpeechEvaluation /&gt;
+     &lt;/AppLayout&gt;
+   );
+ }
+

+ "use client";
+ 
+ import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react";
+ import { useParams, useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+ import { useSession, signOut } from "next-auth/react";
+ import { AppLayout } from "@/components/AppLayout";
+ import { ttsProviders } from "@/components/agent-tabs/constants/providers";
+ import {
+   LeaderboardBarChart,
+   getColorMap,
+ } from "@/components/charts/LeaderboardBarChart";
+ import { DownloadableTable } from "@/components/DownloadableTable";
+ 
+ type MetricItem =
+   | { llm_judge_score: number }
+   | {
+       metric_name: string;
+       processor: string;
+       mean: number;
+       std: number;
+       values: number[];
+     };
+ 
+ type ProviderResult = {
+   provider: string;
+   success: boolean;
+   message: string;
+   metrics: MetricItem[];
+   results: Array&lt;{
+     id: string;
+     text: string;
+     audio_path: string;
+     llm_judge_score: string;
+     llm_judge_reasoning: string;
+   }&gt;;
+ };
+ 
+ type LeaderboardSummary = {
+   run: string;
+   count: number;
+   llm_judge_score: number;
+   ttfb: number;
+   processing_time: number;
+ };
+ 
+ type EvaluationResult = {
+   task_id: string;
+   status: "queued" | "in_progress" | "done";
+   provider_results?: ProviderResult[];
+   leaderboard_summary?: LeaderboardSummary[];
+   error?: string | null;
+ };
+ 
+ // Helper function to map provider value back to label
+ const getProviderLabel = (value: string): string =&gt; {
+   const provider = ttsProviders.find((p) =&gt; p.value === value);
+   return provider ? provider.label : value;
+ };
+ 
+ export default function TTSEvaluationDetailPage() {
+   const router = useRouter();
+   const params = useParams();
+   const { data: session } = useSession();
+   const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;
+   const taskId = params.uuid as string;
+   const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);
+   const [evaluationResult, setEvaluationResult] =
+     useState&lt;EvaluationResult | null&gt;(null);
+   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
+   const [error, setError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;
+     "leaderboard" | "outputs" | "about"
+   &gt;("leaderboard");
+   const [activeProviderTab, setActiveProviderTab] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(
+     null
+   );
+   const pollingIntervalRef = useRef&lt;NodeJS.Timeout | null&gt;(null);
+ 
+   // Cleanup polling interval on unmount
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     return () =&gt; {
+       if (pollingIntervalRef.current) {
+         clearInterval(pollingIntervalRef.current);
+       }
+     };
+   }, []);
+ 
+   // Fetch evaluation result
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     const fetchResult = async () =&gt; {
+       if (!backendAccessToken || !taskId) return;
+ 
+       try {
+         setIsLoading(true);
+         setError(null);
+         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+         if (!backendUrl) {
+           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+         }
+ 
+         const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tts/evaluate/${taskId}&#96;, {
+           method: "GET",
+           headers: {
+             accept: "application/json",
+             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+             Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,
+           },
+         });
+ 
+         if (response.status === 401) {
+           await signOut({ callbackUrl: "/login" });
+           return;
+         }
+ 
+         if (!response.ok) {
+           throw new Error("Failed to fetch evaluation result");
+         }
+ 
+         const result: EvaluationResult = await response.json();
+         setEvaluationResult(result);
+ 
+         // Set first provider as active tab if results exist
+         if (result.provider_results &amp;&amp; result.provider_results.length &gt; 0) {
+           setActiveProviderTab(result.provider_results[0].provider);
+         }
+ 
+         // Start polling if not done
+         if (result.status !== "done" &amp;&amp; !pollingIntervalRef.current) {
+           pollingIntervalRef.current = setInterval(() =&gt; {
+             pollTaskStatus(taskId, backendUrl);
+           }, 2000);
+         }
+       } catch (err) {
+         console.error("Error fetching evaluation result:", err);
+         setError(
+           err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load evaluation"
+         );
+       } finally {
+         setIsLoading(false);
+       }
+     };
+ 
+     fetchResult();
+   }, [taskId, backendAccessToken]);
+ 
+   const pollTaskStatus = async (taskId: string, backendUrl: string) =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tts/evaluate/${taskId}&#96;, {
+         method: "GET",
+         headers: {
+           accept: "application/json",
+           "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+           Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,
+         },
+       });
+ 
+       if (response.status === 401) {
+         await signOut({ callbackUrl: "/login" });
+         return;
+       }
+ 
+       if (!response.ok) {
+         throw new Error("Failed to poll task status");
+       }
+ 
+       const result: EvaluationResult = await response.json();
+       setEvaluationResult(result);
+ 
+       if (result.status === "done") {
+         if (pollingIntervalRef.current) {
+           clearInterval(pollingIntervalRef.current);
+           pollingIntervalRef.current = null;
+         }
+         // Set first provider as active tab if results exist
+         if (result.provider_results &amp;&amp; result.provider_results.length &gt; 0) {
+           setActiveProviderTab(result.provider_results[0].provider);
+         }
+       }
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error("Error polling task status:", error);
+       if (pollingIntervalRef.current) {
+         clearInterval(pollingIntervalRef.current);
+         pollingIntervalRef.current = null;
+       }
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   // Header with back button
+   const customHeader = (
+     &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+       &lt;button
+         onClick={() =&gt; router.push("/tts")}
+         className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+         title="Back to TTS evaluations"
+       &gt;
+         &lt;svg
+           className="w-5 h-5"
+           fill="none"
+           viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+           stroke="currentColor"
+           strokeWidth={2}
+         &gt;
+           &lt;path
+             strokeLinecap="round"
+             strokeLinejoin="round"
+             d="M15.75 19.5L8.25 12l7.5-7.5"
+           /&gt;
+         &lt;/svg&gt;
+       &lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;span className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+         TTS Evaluation
+       &lt;/span&gt;
+       &lt;span className="text-sm font-mono text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+         {taskId.slice(0, 8)}...
+       &lt;/span&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;AppLayout
+       activeItem="tts"
+       onItemChange={(itemId) =&gt; router.push(&#96;/${itemId}&#96;)}
+       sidebarOpen={sidebarOpen}
+       onSidebarToggle={() =&gt; setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
+       customHeader={customHeader}
+     &gt;
+       &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+         {/* Loading State */}
+         {isLoading &amp;&amp; (
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-8"&gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;circle
+                 className="opacity-25"
+                 cx="12"
+                 cy="12"
+                 r="10"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth="4"
+               &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 className="opacity-75"
+                 fill="currentColor"
+                 d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+               &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+             &lt;span className="text-muted-foreground"&gt;Loading evaluation...&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         )}
+ 
+         {/* Error State */}
+         {error &amp;&amp; (
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-base text-red-500 mb-2"&gt;{error}&lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; window.location.reload()}
+               className="text-base text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+             &gt;
+               Retry
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         )}
+ 
+         {/* Evaluation In Progress */}
+         {!isLoading &amp;&amp;
+           !error &amp;&amp;
+           evaluationResult &amp;&amp;
+           evaluationResult.status !== "done" &amp;&amp; (
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3 py-8"&gt;
+               &lt;svg
+                 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
+                 fill="none"
+                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;circle
+                   className="opacity-25"
+                   cx="12"
+                   cy="12"
+                   r="10"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth="4"
+                 &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                 &lt;path
+                   className="opacity-75"
+                   fill="currentColor"
+                   d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                 &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;span className="text-[14px] font-medium"&gt;
+                 {evaluationResult.status === "queued"
+                   ? "Evaluation queued..."
+                   : "Evaluation in progress..."}
+               &lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           )}
+ 
+         {/* Evaluation Results */}
+         {!isLoading &amp;&amp;
+           !error &amp;&amp;
+           evaluationResult &amp;&amp;
+           evaluationResult.status === "done" &amp;&amp; (
+             &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+               {/* Tab Navigation */}
+               &lt;div className="flex gap-2 border-b border-border"&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("leaderboard")}
+                   className={&#96;px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+                     activeTab === "leaderboard"
+                       ? "border-foreground text-foreground"
+                       : "border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+                   }&#96;}
+                 &gt;
+                   Leaderboard
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; {
+                     setActiveTab("outputs");
+                     if (
+                       !activeProviderTab &amp;&amp;
+                       evaluationResult?.provider_results &amp;&amp;
+                       evaluationResult.provider_results.length &gt; 0
+                     ) {
+                       setActiveProviderTab(
+                         evaluationResult.provider_results[0].provider
+                       );
+                     }
+                   }}
+                   className={&#96;px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+                     activeTab === "outputs"
+                       ? "border-foreground text-foreground"
+                       : "border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+                   }&#96;}
+                 &gt;
+                   Outputs
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("about")}
+                   className={&#96;px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium border-b-2 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+                     activeTab === "about"
+                       ? "border-foreground text-foreground"
+                       : "border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+                   }&#96;}
+                 &gt;
+                   About
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               {/* About Tab */}
+               {activeTab === "about" &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
+                     &lt;table className="w-full"&gt;
+                       &lt;thead className="bg-muted/50 border-b border-border"&gt;
+                         &lt;tr&gt;
+                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Metric
+                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Description
+                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Preference
+                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Range
+                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                       &lt;/thead&gt;
+                       &lt;tbody&gt;
+                         &lt;tr className="border-b border-border"&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             LLM Judge Score
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             The LLM judge evaluates whether the synthesized
+                             audio accurately matches the reference text. It
+                             checks for semantic equivalence and pronunciation
+                             accuracy.
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Higher is better
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             0 - 1
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                         &lt;tr className="border-b border-border"&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             TTFB (Time To First Byte)
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Time to first byte measures the latency from when a
+                             request is sent until the first byte of the response
+                             is received.
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Lower is better
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             0 - ∞
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                         &lt;tr className="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Processing Time
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Total time taken to process the text and generate
+                             the audio output.
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             Lower is better
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                             0 - ∞
+                           &lt;/td&gt;
+                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                       &lt;/tbody&gt;
+                     &lt;/table&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               )}
+ 
+               {/* Leaderboard Tab */}
+               {activeTab === "leaderboard" &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;div className="space-y-6 -mx-8 px-8 w-[calc(100vw-260px)] ml-[calc((260px-100vw)/2+50%)] relative"&gt;
+                   {evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary &amp;&amp;
+                     evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+                       &lt;&gt;
+                         &lt;DownloadableTable
+                           columns={[
+                             {
+                               key: "run",
+                               header: "Run",
+                               render: (value) =&gt; getProviderLabel(value),
+                             },
+                             { key: "count", header: "Count" },
+                             { key: "llm_judge_score", header: "LLM Judge Score" },
+                             {
+                               key: "ttfb",
+                               header: "TTFB (s)",
+                               render: (value) =&gt; value.toFixed(5),
+                             },
+                             {
+                               key: "processing_time",
+                               header: "Processing Time (s)",
+                               render: (value) =&gt; value.toFixed(5),
+                             },
+                           ]}
+                           data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary}
+                           filename="tts-evaluation-leaderboard"
+                         /&gt;
+ 
+                         {/* Charts Section */}
+                         {(() =&gt; {
+                           const providerNames =
+                             evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                               (s) =&gt; s.run
+                             );
+                           const colorMap = getColorMap(providerNames);
+                           return (
+                             &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+                               {/* Row 1: LLM Judge Score and TTFB */}
+                               &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6"&gt;
+                                 &lt;LeaderboardBarChart
+                                   title="LLM Judge Score"
+                                   data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                                     (s) =&gt; ({
+                                       label: getProviderLabel(s.run),
+                                       value: s.llm_judge_score,
+                                       colorKey: s.run,
+                                     })
+                                   )}
+                                   colorMap={colorMap}
+                                 /&gt;
+                                 &lt;LeaderboardBarChart
+                                   title="TTFB (s)"
+                                   data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                                     (s) =&gt; ({
+                                       label: getProviderLabel(s.run),
+                                       value: s.ttfb,
+                                       colorKey: s.run,
+                                     })
+                                   )}
+                                   colorMap={colorMap}
+                                 /&gt;
+                               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                               {/* Row 2: Processing Time */}
+                               &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6"&gt;
+                                 &lt;LeaderboardBarChart
+                                   title="Processing Time (s)"
+                                   data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                                     (s) =&gt; ({
+                                       label: getProviderLabel(s.run),
+                                       value: s.processing_time,
+                                       colorKey: s.run,
+                                     })
+                                   )}
+                                   colorMap={colorMap}
+                                 /&gt;
+                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                             &lt;/div&gt;
+                           );
+                         })()}
+                       &lt;/&gt;
+                     )}
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               )}
+ 
+               {/* Outputs Tab */}
+               {activeTab === "outputs" &amp;&amp; evaluationResult.provider_results &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;div className="space-y-4 -mx-8 px-8 w-[calc(100vw-260px)] ml-[calc((260px-100vw)/2+50%)] relative"&gt;
+                   {/* Provider Dropdown */}
+                   &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+                       &lt;select
+                         value={
+                           activeProviderTab ||
+                           (evaluationResult.provider_results.length &gt; 0
+                             ? evaluationResult.provider_results[0].provider
+                             : "")
+                         }
+                         onChange={(e) =&gt; setActiveProviderTab(e.target.value)}
+                         className="h-10 px-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-[13px] border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none min-w-[180px]"
+                       &gt;
+                         {evaluationResult.provider_results.map(
+                           (providerResult) =&gt; (
+                             &lt;option
+                               key={providerResult.provider}
+                               value={providerResult.provider}
+                             &gt;
+                               {getProviderLabel(providerResult.provider)}
+                             &lt;/option&gt;
+                           )
+                         )}
+                       &lt;/select&gt;
+                       &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+                         &lt;svg
+                           className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                           fill="none"
+                           viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                           stroke="currentColor"
+                           strokeWidth={2}
+                         &gt;
+                           &lt;path
+                             strokeLinecap="round"
+                             strokeLinejoin="round"
+                             d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                           /&gt;
+                         &lt;/svg&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                   {/* Provider Content */}
+                   {(activeProviderTab ||
+                     (evaluationResult.provider_results.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp;
+                       evaluationResult.provider_results[0].provider)) &amp;&amp; (
+                     &lt;&gt;
+                       {evaluationResult.provider_results
+                         .filter(
+                           (pr) =&gt;
+                             pr.provider ===
+                             (activeProviderTab ||
+                               (evaluationResult.provider_results &amp;&amp;
+                                 evaluationResult.provider_results[0]?.provider))
+                         )
+                         .map((providerResult) =&gt; (
+                           &lt;div
+                             key={providerResult.provider}
+                             className="space-y-6"
+                           &gt;
+                             {/* Error Message */}
+                             {!providerResult.success &amp;&amp;
+                               providerResult.message &amp;&amp; (
+                                 &lt;div className="text-[13px] text-red-500 flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+                                   &lt;span&gt;❌&lt;/span&gt;
+                                   &lt;span&gt;{providerResult.message}&lt;/span&gt;
+                                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                               )}
+ 
+                             {/* Overall Metrics - Only show if success */}
+                             {providerResult.success &amp;&amp; (
+                               &lt;div className="border rounded-xl p-4 bg-muted/10"&gt;
+                                 &lt;h3 className="text-[15px] font-semibold mb-4"&gt;
+                                   Overall Metrics
+                                 &lt;/h3&gt;
+                                 &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+                                   {/* First Row: LLM Judge Score */}
+                                   &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4"&gt;
+                                     {providerResult.metrics.map(
+                                       (metric, index) =&gt; {
+                                         if ("llm_judge_score" in metric) {
+                                           return (
+                                             &lt;div key={index}&gt;
+                                               &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                                                 LLM Judge Score
+                                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                                               &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {metric.llm_judge_score}
+                                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                                             &lt;/div&gt;
+                                           );
+                                         }
+                                         return null;
+                                       }
+                                     )}
+                                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                                   {/* Second Row: TTFB, Processing Time */}
+                                   &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4"&gt;
+                                     {providerResult.metrics.map(
+                                       (metric, index) =&gt; {
+                                         if ("metric_name" in metric) {
+                                           const displayName =
+                                             metric.metric_name === "ttfb"
+                                               ? "TTFB (s)"
+                                               : metric.metric_name ===
+                                                 "processing_time"
+                                               ? "Processing Time (s)"
+                                               : metric.metric_name;
+                                           return (
+                                             &lt;div key={index}&gt;
+                                               &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                                                 {displayName}
+                                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                                               &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {metric.mean.toFixed(5)}
+                                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                                             &lt;/div&gt;
+                                           );
+                                         }
+                                         return null;
+                                       }
+                                     )}
+                                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                             )}
+ 
+                             {/* Results Table */}
+                             {providerResult.results &amp;&amp;
+                               providerResult.results.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+                                 &lt;div className="border rounded-xl overflow-visible"&gt;
+                                   &lt;div className="overflow-hidden rounded-xl"&gt;
+                                     &lt;table className="w-full"&gt;
+                                       &lt;thead className="bg-muted/50 border-b border-border"&gt;
+                                         &lt;tr&gt;
+                                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                             ID
+                                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                             Text
+                                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                             Audio
+                                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                             LLM Judge Score
+                                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                                           &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                             LLM Judge Reasoning
+                                           &lt;/th&gt;
+                                         &lt;/tr&gt;
+                                       &lt;/thead&gt;
+                                       &lt;tbody&gt;
+                                         {providerResult.results.map(
+                                           (result, index) =&gt; (
+                                             &lt;tr
+                                               key={index}
+                                               className="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"
+                                             &gt;
+                                               &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {index + 1}
+                                               &lt;/td&gt;
+                                               &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 {result.text}
+                                               &lt;/td&gt;
+                                               &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
+                                                 &lt;audio
+                                                   controls
+                                                   className="w-full min-w-[400px]"
+                                                   src={result.audio_path}
+                                                 &gt;
+                                                   Your browser does not support
+                                                   the audio element.
+                                                 &lt;/audio&gt;

-                                         &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;
-                                           LLM Judge Score
-                                         &lt;/div&gt;
-                                         &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
-                                           {metric.llm_judge_score}
-                                         &lt;/div&gt;
-                                       &lt;/div&gt;
-                                     );
-                                   }
-                                   return null;
-                                 })}
-                               &lt;/div&gt;
-                               {/* Second Row: TTFB, Processing Time */}
-                               &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4"&gt;
-                                 {providerResult.metrics.map((metric, index) =&gt; {
-                                   if ("metric_name" in metric) {
-                                     const displayName =
-                                       metric.metric_name === "ttfb"
-                                         ? "TTFB (s)"
-                                         : metric.metric_name ===
-                                           "processing_time"
-                                         ? "Processing Time (s)"
-                                         : metric.metric_name;
-                                     return (
-                                       &lt;div key={index}&gt;
-                                         &lt;div className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground mb-1"&gt;
-                                           {displayName}
-                                         &lt;/div&gt;
-                                         &lt;div className="text-[18px] font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
-                                           {metric.mean.toFixed(5)}
-                                         &lt;/div&gt;
-                                       &lt;/div&gt;
-                                     );
-                                   }
-                                   return null;
-                                 })}
-                               &lt;/div&gt;
-                             &lt;/div&gt;
-                           &lt;/div&gt;
-                         )}
- 
-                         {/* Results Table */}
-                         {providerResult.results &amp;&amp;
-                           providerResult.results.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
-                             &lt;div className="border rounded-xl overflow-visible"&gt;
-                               &lt;div className="overflow-hidden rounded-xl"&gt;
-                                 &lt;table className="w-full"&gt;
-                                   &lt;thead className="bg-muted/50 border-b border-border"&gt;
-                                     &lt;tr&gt;
-                                       &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-                                         ID
-                                       &lt;/th&gt;
-                                       &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-                                         Text
-                                       &lt;/th&gt;
-                                       &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-                                         Audio
-                                       &lt;/th&gt;
-                                       &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-                                         LLM Judge Score
-                                       &lt;/th&gt;
-                                       &lt;th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[12px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-                                         LLM Judge Reasoning
-                                       &lt;/th&gt;
-                                     &lt;/tr&gt;
-                                   &lt;/thead&gt;
-                                   &lt;tbody&gt;
-                                     {providerResult.results.map(
-                                       (result, index) =&gt; (
-                                         &lt;tr
-                                           key={index}
-                                           className="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"
-                                         &gt;
-                                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
-                                             {index + 1}
-                                           &lt;/td&gt;
-                                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
-                                             {result.text}
-                                           &lt;/td&gt;
-                                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
-                                             &lt;audio
-                                               controls
-                                               className="w-full min-w-[400px]"
-                                               src={result.audio_path}
-                                             &gt;
-                                               Your browser does not support the
-                                               audio element.
-                                             &lt;/audio&gt;
-                                           &lt;/td&gt;
-                                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-foreground"&gt;
-                                             {result.llm_judge_score}
-                                           &lt;/td&gt;
-                                           &lt;td className="px-4 py-3 text-[13px] text-muted-foreground max-w-md"&gt;
-                                             {result.llm_judge_reasoning}
-                                           &lt;/td&gt;
-                                         &lt;/tr&gt;
-                                       )
-                                     )}
-                                   &lt;/tbody&gt;
-                                 &lt;/table&gt;
-                               &lt;/div&gt;
-                             &lt;/div&gt;
-                           )}
-                       &lt;/div&gt;
-                     ))}
-                 &lt;/&gt;
-               )}
-             &lt;/div&gt;
-           )}
-         &lt;/div&gt;
-       )}
  
        {/* Delete Confirmation Dialog */}

I've updated the TTS Evaluation page as requested. Here's what was done:

## Changes Made:

### 1. Updated `/tts/page.tsx` - Main TTS page now shows a list of TTS jobs
- Fetches TTS jobs from `GET /jobs?job_type=tts` endpoint
- Displays jobs in a table with Task ID, Status, Providers, and Updated At columns
- Includes sorting by date and status badges (similar to simulation runs)
- Has a "New TTS Evaluation" button in the header

### 2. Created `/tts/new/page.tsx` - New evaluation creation page
- Contains the evaluation form with text inputs, language selection, and provider selection
- Includes a back button to return to the TTS jobs list
- After submitting, redirects to the evaluation detail page

### 3. Created `/tts/[uuid]/page.tsx` - Evaluation detail page
- Shows the evaluation results with Leaderboard, Outputs, and About tabs
- Handles polling for in-progress evaluations
- Displays loading, error, and in-progress states

### 4. Updated `TextToSpeechEvaluation.tsx` component
- Simplified to only contain the evaluation form
- After creating an evaluation, redirects to `/tts/{task_id}` to view results
- Removed the inline results display (now shown on the detail page)

## Flow:
1. User visits `/tts` → sees list of all TTS evaluation jobs
2. User clicks "New TTS Evaluation" → goes to `/tts/new`
3. User fills in text samples, selects language and providers, clicks "Evaluate"
4. Evaluation is created and user is redirected to `/tts/{task_id}`
5. User sees evaluation progress and results on the detail page

@@ -533,4 +533,32 @@
  - Action button: &#96;h-8 px-4 text-sm&#96;
  - Action wrapper: &#96;mr-2&#96; for spacing from profile dropdown
+ 
+ ### Evaluation Page Pattern (TTS/STT)
+ 
+ Evaluation pages follow a list → new → detail pattern similar to simulations:
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ /tts                    # List all TTS evaluation jobs
+ /tts/new                # Create new evaluation (form + submit)
+ /tts/[uuid]             # View evaluation results (polling + tabs)
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ **List Page:**
+ - Fetches jobs from &#96;GET /jobs?job_type=tts&#96;
+ - Displays in sortable table with Task ID, Status, Providers, Updated At
+ - "New TTS Evaluation" button navigates to &#96;/tts/new&#96;
+ - Clicking a row navigates to &#96;/tts/[uuid]&#96;
+ 
+ **New Page:**
+ - Contains the evaluation form component
+ - On submit: calls &#96;POST /tts/evaluate&#96;, then redirects to &#96;/tts/{task_id}&#96;
+ - Has back button in custom header to return to list
+ 
+ **Detail Page:**
+ - Fetches result from &#96;GET /tts/evaluate/{taskId}&#96;
+ - Polls every 2 seconds while status is &#96;queued&#96; or &#96;in_progress&#96;
+ - Shows loading/in-progress states during polling
+ - Displays results in tabs (Leaderboard, Outputs, About) when done
+ - Has back button in custom header to return to list
  
  ### Component Patterns
```

</details>

</tool-use>

I've updated `.cursor/rules/app-details.md` with the following changes:

1. **Updated Section 4 (Text-to-Speech Evaluation)** - Now describes the new page structure:
   - `/tts` - List page showing all TTS evaluation jobs
   - `/tts/new` - Create a new TTS evaluation
   - `/tts/[uuid]` - View evaluation details and results

2. **Updated Project Structure** - Added the new TTS page hierarchy showing the `new/` and `[uuid]/` subdirectories

3. **Added Jobs API Endpoint** - Added `GET /jobs` with optional `job_type` query param (`stt` or `tts`)

4. **Added new "Evaluation Page Pattern" section** - Documents the reusable list → new → detail pattern used for TTS (and potentially STT in the future):
   - How list pages fetch and display jobs
   - How new pages create evaluations and redirect
   - How detail pages poll for results and display tabs

I've fixed the issues:

1. **Updated `/tts/page.tsx`** to match the actual API response:
   - Changed from `task_id` to `uuid`
   - Updated the type to handle the nested `details` object with `providers`, `texts`, and `language`
   - New table columns:
     - **Providers** (as pills) - shows all selected providers as small badges
     - **Language** - shows English/Hindi
     - **Status** - shows Queued/Running/Done/Failed with colored badges
     - **Samples** - shows the count of text samples (`details.texts.length`)
     - **Updated At** - sortable date column

2. **Updated `/tts/[uuid]/page.tsx`** to handle the actual API response:
   - Changed type from `EvaluationResult` to `TTSJobResponse` matching the actual structure
   - Results are now accessed via `jobData.results?.provider_results` and `jobData.results?.leaderboard_summary` (nested under `results`)
   - Renamed variables from `taskId` to `jobId` for clarity

@@ -959,7 +959,42 @@
  | Tests           | &#96;GET/POST /tests&#96;, &#96;GET/PUT/DELETE /tests/{uuid}&#96;                                       |
  | Agent Tests     | &#96;GET /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/tests&#96;, &#96;POST/DELETE /agent-tests&#96;                       |
- | STT Evaluation  | &#96;POST /stt/evaluate&#96;, &#96;GET /stt/evaluate/{taskId}&#96;                                      |
- | TTS Evaluation  | &#96;POST /tts/evaluate&#96;, &#96;GET /tts/evaluate/{taskId}&#96;                                      |
+ | STT Evaluation  | &#96;POST /stt/evaluate&#96;, &#96;GET /stt/evaluate/{uuid}&#96;                                        |
+ | TTS Evaluation  | &#96;POST /tts/evaluate&#96;, &#96;GET /tts/evaluate/{uuid}&#96;                                        |
  | Jobs            | &#96;GET /jobs&#96; (optional &#96;job_type&#96; query param: &#96;stt&#96; or &#96;tts&#96;)                           |
+ 
+ ### Jobs API Response Structure
+ 
+ The &#96;/jobs&#96; endpoint returns evaluation jobs with the following structure:
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;json
+ {
+   "jobs": [
+     {
+       "uuid": "1d8db518-d209-4365-a77e-45a8ec3abcee",
+       "type": "tts-eval",
+       "status": "done",
+       "details": {
+         "texts": ["sample text 1", "sample text 2"],
+         "providers": ["cartesia", "openai", "google"],
+         "language": "english"
+       },
+       "results": {
+         "provider_results": [...],
+         "leaderboard_summary": [...],
+         "error": null
+       },
+       "created_at": "2026-01-17 06:18:20",
+       "updated_at": "2026-01-17 06:18:53"
+     }
+   ]
+ }
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ **Key fields:**
+ - &#96;uuid&#96;: Job identifier (NOT &#96;task_id&#96;)
+ - &#96;details.texts&#96;: Array of input texts (use &#96;.length&#96; to get sample count)
+ - &#96;details.providers&#96;: Array of provider names
+ - &#96;details.language&#96;: Language setting
+ - &#96;results&#96;: Contains &#96;provider_results&#96; and &#96;leaderboard_summary&#96; (nested, not top-level)
  | Presigned URLs  | &#96;POST /presigned-url&#96;                                                                   |
  
```

</details>

</tool-use>

I've reverted the detail page to its original working state. The key difference is:

- **List page** (`/tts/page.tsx`): Uses `/jobs?job_type=tts` which returns data with `uuid` and nested `details.providers`, `results.provider_results`
- **Detail page** (`/tts/[uuid]/page.tsx`): Uses `/tts/evaluate/{taskId}` which returns `provider_results` and `leaderboard_summary` directly at the top level (not nested)

The detail page now uses the original API endpoint and structure that was working before.

  - &#96;details.language&#96;: Language setting
  - &#96;results&#96;: Contains &#96;provider_results&#96; and &#96;leaderboard_summary&#96; (nested, not top-level)
+ 
+ ### TTS/STT Evaluate API Response Structure (Different from Jobs API!)
+ 
+ The &#96;/tts/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; and &#96;/stt/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; endpoints return a **different structure** than &#96;/jobs&#96;:
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;json
+ {
+   "task_id": "1d8db518-d209-4365-a77e-45a8ec3abcee",
+   "status": "done",
+   "provider_results": [...],
+   "leaderboard_summary": [...],
+   "error": null
+ }
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ **Key difference:** Results are at the **top level** (not nested under &#96;results&#96;).
+ 
+ | Endpoint | ID Field | Results Location |
+ |----------|----------|------------------|
+ | &#96;GET /jobs&#96; | &#96;uuid&#96; | &#96;results.provider_results&#96; |
+ | &#96;GET /tts/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; | &#96;task_id&#96; | &#96;provider_results&#96; (top-level) |
+ | &#96;GET /stt/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; | &#96;task_id&#96; | &#96;provider_results&#96; (top-level) |
+ 
  | Presigned URLs  | &#96;POST /presigned-url&#96;                                                                   |
  
```

</details>

</tool-use>

Updated `.cursor/rules/app-details.md` with the critical gotcha discovered:

1. **Added "TTS/STT Evaluate API Response Structure" section** - Documents the key difference between the `/jobs` and `/tts/evaluate/{uuid}` APIs:

   | `GET /tts/evaluate/{uuid}` | `task_id` | `provider_results` (top-level) |

3. **Updated Evaluation Page Pattern** - Clarified that the detail page uses `/tts/evaluate/{uuid}` (NOT `/jobs`) and results are at top level

4. **Fixed formatting** - Moved the Presigned URLs row back into the API Endpoints table

+ const formatStatus = (status: string) =&gt; {
+   switch (status.toLowerCase()) {
+     case "queued":
+       return "Queued";
+     case "in_progress":
+       return "Running";
+     case "done":
+       return "Done";
+     case "failed":
+       return "Failed";
+     default:
+       return status;
+   }
+ };
+ 
+ const getStatusBadgeClass = (status: string) =&gt; {
+   switch (status.toLowerCase()) {
+     case "done":
+     case "completed":
+       return "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-500/20 dark:text-green-400";
+     case "running":
+     case "in_progress":
+       return "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-500/20 dark:text-yellow-400";
+     case "failed":
+     case "error":
+       return "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-500/20 dark:text-red-400";
+     case "pending":
+     case "queued":
+       return "bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-500/20 dark:text-gray-400";
+     default:
+       return "bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-500/20 dark:text-gray-400";

   - The results tabs only appear when status is "done"

The status display now matches the simulation run page's pattern with consistent styling and behavior.

+   - &#96;queued&#96; → "Queued" (gray badge)
+   - &#96;in_progress&#96; → "Running" (yellow badge)
+   - &#96;done&#96; → "Done" (green badge)
+   - &#96;failed&#96; → "Failed" (red badge)
+   - Show a spinner next to the badge for queued/in_progress states
+   - Badge classes use dark mode variants: &#96;dark:bg-{color}-500/20 dark:text-{color}-400&#96;
  
  ### Styling
```

</details>

</tool-use>
